title: GE Healthcare India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: GE Healthcare India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? GE Healthcare India in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About GE Healthcare India:
GE Healthcare India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GE Healthcare India!
